titleStmt.title: SII 9.296: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 296. (A.R. No. 58 of 1904.) ON A SLAB SET UP ON THE SOUTH SIDE OF THE MANDAPA IN FRONT OF THE KALLESVARA TEMPLE AT KURUGODU, BELLARY TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: The inscription is dated Śaka 1097, Manmatha, Pushya, amāvāsye, Sōmavāra, Sūryagrahaṇa, Uttarāyaṇa saṅkramaṇa. The date is irregular. In Manmatha there was no solar eclipse on Pushya amāvāsye, which fell on Tuesday 13 January A.D. 1176. It was not also the day of Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkramaṇa. The record belongs to the reign of the Kalachurya king Kuntaladēsa-chakravarti Rāyāmurāri-Sōvidēva. The Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Rāchamalla of the Sinda family, who was Sōvidēva's feudatory, is said to have made a grant of land for the worship of the god Kalidēva, set up by Kalliseṭṭi, one of the Mummuridaṇḍas in Kuṟugōḍu. The Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Ajjarasa of Baḷḷāre is said to have made a gift of land for an aravaṭṭige, and satra for pilgirms and for the worship of the god. The Mummuridaṇḍas and the Nakharas are said to have made a grant of taxes on merchandise. As in No. 297 the warlike spirit of the Mummuridaṇḍas is well described.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīkalidēva . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāvaracāravē . traiḷōkyanagarā
raṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . śrirāmāramaṇapraṇutamahi
maṁ bṛṁdārakōdārabṛndārādhyaṁ tridaśādhināthanagajācaṁcatkucālōlakāśmīrōrasthaḷa
nabjasaṁbhavanataṁ traiḷōkyanistāravistāraṁ śrīkalidēvanoldu namagīgiṣṭārtthasaṁsiddhiyaṁ . va . Antu jagatkartta
nenisida mahādēvaneṁdudbhāvitamādiḷāvanitege kāṁcīmudreyaṁte cakramenisida samudramentene .
v® . madava(ṁ)nnīrēbhenīrāśvakakarimakarōccaṁḍamaṁḍūkagaṇḍūṣada nānānakracakrakraka
cakamaṭhalōṭhatsapāṭhīnarājīviditakṣudrōdarādiprabaḷajaḷacarānīkasaṁkṣōbha
pucchacchadavātāghātabhūtōdvahaḷalaharikāsphārabhadraṁ samudraṁ . va . śrīma jjaṁbū dvīpa
doḷ bharatamahīkānteya kuṁtaḷadaṁtesavutirdda kuṁtaḷadēśada tuṁgabhadrā nadiyiṁteṁ kal . v® . va
naruhaṣaṁḍadiṁ beḷeda keyvoladiṁ sahakārasārasatpanasalavaṁgakauṁgalavalītiḷakaprata
ḷapravāḷanūtanakaranāgapūgasakaḷarddhakanandanadindaveyde tāne nalidu ballakunde naḍuvikkuta voppugu
vetta nōrppaḍaṁ . Alli paṭṭaṇaṁ kuṟugōḍadurggameṁtene
v® . cōḷananāḷumāḍuvudu gūrjjararaṁ sale tarddikuṁ ka
raṁ lāḷananāḷimāḍuvudu pāṁḍyananaṁḍaleguṁ teluṁgabhūpālananēḷidikkeyane māḍuvudī kuṟugōḍakō
ṭe tāṁ kāḷegaveṁdaḍēḷumaḍi perccuvudaccari yāro kāduvar . kaṁ . Ā puramaṁ pratipāḷipa bhūpaśi
khāmaṇi śivaikacūḍāmaṇi digbyāpi yaśōdarppaṇamaṇi tāpitaripu rācamallanapratimallaṁ . va . sva
sti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaranuṁ bhōgāvatīpuravarādhīśvaranuṁ sitagaraga
ṇḍanuṁ siṁdagōviṁdanuṁ pātāḷacakravarttiya śrīvīrakalidēvara pādārādhakanumenisida rāca
malladēvana rājyamuttarōttaravāguttiralu tatpuranivāsigaḷappa muṁmuridaṁḍagaḷa mahime
yenteṁdeḍe . ragaḷe . svasti gavaṟēśapadapadmaṣaṭcaraṇaruṁ . vistīrṇavastuguṇavinihitācaraṇaruṁ . (.)
paṁcaśatavīraśāsanaguṇōddharaṇaruṁ . saṁcitasamasta dharmmaikanistaraṇaruṁ . byavahāranayavi
nayavijñānavidyaruṁ . navaratnavāhanaparīkṣānavadyaruṁ . śaraṇeṁdukaṁḍaraṁ karuṇadiṁ kāvaruṁ .
birudiṁge bīguvara haraṇavaṁ sōvaruṁ . tōṭiyeṁdaḍe kōṭilābhaveṁdulivaruṁ Āṭaṁdabavarakke nā
ṭakaṁ nalivaruṁ . Ayyāvoḷeya taḷadiniduvenerggiṟidenipa . rayyamādvārāvatīpurake kuṟuvenipa .
kuṟugōḍa taḷadoḷage taḷaradaynūrvvaruṁ neṟe nōrppaḍavaroḷage pagegaṁjarorvaruṁ . va . Ā mu(ṁ)mmuri
daṁḍaṁgaḷoḷ mahāvinahāḷa kalliseṭṭiyanveyaventene . kaṁ . Eḷeyoḷage siṁdavāḍige tilakadavolese
va mudiyanūroḷpeṁpaggaḷada baṇaṁjiganene mūguḷabuddhiya kētiseṭṭiya pogaḷadarār . v® . mū
guḷabuddhiyeṁba pesaraṁ paḍadoppuva kētiseṭṭigaṁ bhāgini caṁdikabbegogedirdda sutarggeṇeyāru lōkado
ḷ nāgamaseṭṭigaṁ negaḷda mādhavaseṭṭige bēḍiseṭṭigudyōgada rudraseṭṭige negaḷtepogeḷteya cīliseṭṭigaṁ .
kaṁ . Aṁtenipa nāgiseṭṭige kāṁte patibratege mākaṇabbege sutaratyaṁtaguṇi mādiseṭṭayumaṁtā
kalidēvaseṭṭiyuṁ pesarvvaḍeder . Aṁtirvvaroḷage birudabaṇaṁjigaraynūrvvara putraṁ kalliseṭṭi gōtrapavitraṁ .
hariyaḷada purada kalidēvara varaputraṁ parāṁganājanaputraṁ . vai . husiyada mātu koṭṭaḷipa
dārppu kaḷaṁkadoḷguṁdadoḷjesaṁ . kusiyada dhairyyaṁ vōjegiḍadoḷguṇavaṁjada bīravegginiṁ musukada
rūpu daṇavaṇaveḷḷanitillada śaṁbhubhakti bhāvise kalidēvarīyalivu saṁdapuvī kalidēvaseṭṭiyoḷ .
kaṁ . kalidēvaseṭṭiyuttamakulavanite kulīne patihitāḷaṁkrite tāṁ kalidēvapadārādhaki sale kē
tāmbikeye dhanye dharaṇītaḷadoḷ . kalidēvaseṭṭigaṁ kētalegaṁ makkaḷ vinūta vāgāṁbikeyācale sa
kalaguṇanidhānaṁ kalidēvanenalke dhanyarārivariṁdaṁ . v® . satyada bittu sāhasada sāgara voḷguṇa
dāgaraṁ janastutyateyoḷpu dharmmada tavarmmane . māṁtanadirkkedāṇavaucityada jasada saypu ne
gaḷteya lokadēḷgeyaunnatyada gottenutte dhare baṇnipudī kalidēvaseṭṭiyaṁ . mattamātana byavasāya
byavahāraventene . kaṁ . bhaktiya bhaṁḍa vodal nijabhaktiye kōṭānukōṭilābhaṁ śivasadbhaktiya beḷasi
bhakta kalidēvaseṭṭi negaḷdaṁ dhareyoḷ . va . Ātana hṛdayakamaḷadoḷ manaḥprēraka mahādēvaṁ jīva
nāgirppanentene . kaṁ . cintāmaṇiliṁgaṁ hṛdayāntaradoḷnandu kalliseṭṭige dayeyiṁdintu naḍe yintu nuḍi
yeṁdiṁtu sadā śikṣisutte rakṣisutirppaṁ . va . Aṁtu nijāṁtaraṁgadoḷirddu bhaktiymaṁ śaktiymaṁ ku
ḍe bahiraṁgake varaprasādambaḷedu kuṟugōḍa teṁkaṇa bhāgadal māṭakūṭaprasādadēgu

lamaṁ māḍisi taṁniṣṭavappa . kaṁ . kalidēvargge śivōtsavadolaviṁde kaḷāpra
tiṣṭheyaṁ māḍida dēgulamumanettisidī nirmmaḷadhārmmikananipa kalliseṭṭi kṛtārtthaṁ .
bhūtēśana paḍuvaṇa vikhyātiya keṟe baḍagaleseva tīrtthaṁ teṁkalu śītaḷabhāviya
nagaḷisidāteṁ kalidēvaseṭṭi dhanyaṁ jagadoḷ . Antu . kaṭṭisida keṟe manōmudadiṭṭārave pa
siyalīyadikkuva satra biṭṭa beḷageygaḷeṟevaṟavaṭṭige kalidēvaseṭṭi māḍida dharmmaṁ .
va . Antu dharmmamūrjjitavāguttiral samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ pṛthvīvallabhaṁ mahārājā
dhirājaṁ paramēśvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ kaḷacuryyakuḷatiḷakaṁ bhujabaḷama
llaṁ kuṁtaḷadēśada cakravartti rāyamurāri sōvidēvana rājyaṁ pravarttisutta
miralu sakavarṣada 1097neya manumathasaṁvatsarada puṣya
damāvāsye sōmavāra sūryyagrahaṇa Uttarāyaṇasaṁkramā
ṇada puṇyatithiyalu śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ paramamāhēśvaraṁ rājamalladēvaru kallise
ṭṭiyiṁ supratiṣṭhitamādī śrīkalidēvargge bhaktipūrvvakavāgi yalliya sthānācāryya (.)
ru . kaṁ . śivaśaktisutaṁ kalidēvavarāṁghrisarōjapūjakaṁ sakalaguṇōdbhavakāḷāmukhati
ḷakaṁ bhuvanastutanenipanamṛtarāśimunīṁdraṁ . Amṛtaguṇanamṛtamānasanamṛtōtta
mavāṇiyamṛtahastāṁbujanantamritamatiyamṛtamahimāpramitanenippamṛtarāśimuni kri
takṛtyaṁ . va . Antenisidamṛtarāśidēvaravara jīyara kālaṁ karcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ kalliseṭṭi mu
khyavāgi kuṟugōḍa baḍagaṇaraḷiyakeṟeyiṁ mūḍal nīrahaḷḷadiṁ gavaṟēśvarada bhōgada stha
ḷadiṁ teṁkal paraṁjyōtidēvara keyyiṁ paḍuval kalidēvaraṁgabhōgaraṁgabhōgakhaṁḍasphuṭi
tajīrṇnōddhāravintinitakkaṁ biṭṭa takkilamattar 2 Ā sthaḷada naḍuve saṁkimeyaṁge kaṁba 225 .
dēvara hāḍuvātaṁge kaṁba 225 © śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ baḷḷāreyajjarasaru haṭṭa
ṇada holadoḷage siṁgadēviya dāriyiṁ mūḍal gauḍokkala dēvageyyiṁ baḍagal koppēśvarada
keyyiṁ teṁkal Aṟavaṭige satravaṁbali yinitakkaṁ biṭṭa takkilamattar 1 caitrapavitra Atithi
yabhyāgatatapōdhanara grāsekke biṭṭa takkilamattar 1 . Alliṁ paḍuvalu samastaprāṇigaḷge biṭṭa
dharmmavaṇnigege kaṁba 450 mattamā holada dēvaraṁgabhōganaivēdyakke kuṟugōḍa holavēreyim mū
ḍaṇa kisumattar 2 kuṟugōḍa teṁkaṇa hūdōṇṭa 1 dēvara puradoḷage naṁdādīvigege gāṇa 2 ma
ttaṁ nakharaṁgaḷu hoṁgaḷadalli koṭṭalli bhatta soḷasa 2 koṇḍalli soḷasa 2 muṁmuridaṁḍagaḷaysaṁ
baradalli dēvargge hoṁge koṭṭalli kāṇi 1 koṁḍalli kāṇi 1 taṁbuliga sāsirvvaru dēvargge hēṟiṁ
gele 100 hoṟegele 50 sthānācāryyaribbaruṁ sītāḷagaddugege koḍa 20 vasudhāre 2
maṁ naḍasuvar yiṁtī dharmmavanarasugaḷuṁ mummuridaṁḍaṁgaḷuṁ pratipāḷisuvaru
Avargge gaṁgevāraṇāsikurukṣētradibyatīrthaṁgaḷalu sāsira kapilegaḷaṁ sāsira brāhmaṇa
rggaṁ sāsira tapōdhanarggaḷaṁkārasahitaṁ koṭṭa puṇyada phaḷaṁgaḷakku . yintī dharmmaṁgaḷaṁ ki
ḍisidavarige gaṁgevāraṇāsikurukṣētraprayāgeyargghyatīrtthaṁgaḷalu sāsira
kapilegaḷaṁ sāsira brāhmaṇarumaṁ sāsira tapōdhanarumaṁ konda mahāpātakaṁgaḷavarigakku .
mattaṁ nālkuṁ nāḍugaḷuṁ neredāvanāḍalu hēṟidaḍaṁ kōṇa 10 Ettu 10 katte 10 Antu 30
kkaṁ hārikāyasuṁkamaṁ śrīkalidēvarigeyaṁgabhōgapūjepunaskārakke mānyavāgi dha
rmmakke koṭṭar . ślōka . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasēturnṛpāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō
bhavadbhiḥ . sarvvānētān bhāvinaḥ pārtthivēndrān bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmacaṁdraḥ . svada
ttāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēti vasundharāṁ ṣaṣṭhirvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 9.296 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
